title: Does the Method of Acceleration Matter? Exploring the Likelihood of College Coursetaking Success Across Four Developmental Education Instructional Strategies
author: Mokher, Christine G.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This is the accepted manuscript version of the work published in its final form as Mokher, Christine G.; Park-Gaghan, Toby J.; Hu, Shouping.  Does the Method of Acceleration Matter? Exploring the Likelihood of College Coursetaking Success Across Four Developmental Education Instructional Strategies . Teachers College Record: The Voice of Scholarship in Education Volume: 123 issue: 9, page(s): 3-27 .  https://doi.org/10.1177/01614681211052000
